description: parse_network_usage returns records from a synthetic SRUDB.dat
steps: Build a minimal synthetic ESE database containing one NetworkUsage leaf page with 3 encoded records
Verify exactly 3 NetworkUsageRecord values are in the Vec
Verify bytes_sent and bytes_recv match the encoded values
Verify timestamps parse to the correct UTC datetime

description: NetworkUsageRecord app_id matches the encoded integer ID
steps: Encode a record with app_id = 99 in the synthetic page
Call parse_network_usage and inspect the result

description: Invalid ESE signature still returns Err from parse_network_usage
steps: Create a file whose first 4096 bytes have a wrong magic value
